-0.1548*exp(-11.2778*(0.9893 - x_3)**5 + 0.5541*sin(0.6176*x_1 - 1.3852) - 0.0576*sin(3.3623*x_2 + 2.4267) + 0.2707*sinh(0.7619 - 1.3467*x_4)) + 0.055*sin(0.381*(0.7278 - x_4)**2 + 0.2144*sin(1.7874*x_1 - 7.5991) + 1.6528*tanh(0.7185*x_2 - 1.2697) - 0.13*tanh(3.1906*x_3 - 1.1587) + 10.9991) - 0.1625
